description: A designed political poster combining a hero photo with assembled news headlines. The top is a dramatic, dark-vignetted color photograph of Donald Trump in a dark navy suit, white shirt and purple tie, wearing a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap, giving a military-style salute while looking upward. Across the middle in large white type (italic 'Hire' + bold caps) is the slogan 'Hire AMERICAN!'. Below are three torn-paper-style clipped headlines from outlets: TIME — 'Trump Administration launches H-1B Visa Probe Project Firewall'; The Washington Post — 'Trump administration to get tough on companies that misuse the H-1B visa'; and a blue Bloomberg Law banner — 'Labor Department Threatens H-1B Ban for Rule-Breaking Businesses'. The technique is heroic imagery plus 'card-stacking' of supportive media headlines to validate a worker-nationalist message against H-1B visa use. Target audience: American workers and the administration's base, promoting an 'America First' labor agenda.
notable_text: Hire AMERICAN! / Trump Administration launches H-1B Visa Probe 'Project Firewall' / Trump administration to get tough on companies that misuse the H-1B visa / Labor Department Threatens H-1B Ban for Rule-Breaking Businesses
